                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 k 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                      for some  
                                        
                                           k 
                                           ≠ 
                                           i 
                                           , 
                                           j 
                                        
                                     , an analogous reasoning can be made for  
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              k 
                                           
                                        
                                     , that is, three situations regarding the value of  
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              k 
                                           
                                        
                                      arise. The two first cases yield a contradiction as above. In the third case  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 k 
                                              
                                           
                                           = 
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       r 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 r 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                      holds for some  
                                        
                                           r 
                                           ≠ 
                                           i 
                                           , 
                                           j 
                                           , 
                                           k 
                                        
                                     . Hence,  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           = 
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       r 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 r 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     . The recursive application of this reasoning leads to the expression  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           = 
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       r 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           … 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     . Since all the quotients are greater than one,  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           > 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     , which is also a contradiction. 
                               
                            
                         
                         Therefore, the result follows. □

For the case of two agents,  Kreps and Scheinkman (1983)  proved that if  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                     
                                        j 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , then  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           r 
                                        
                                        
                                           j 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . This result can straightforwardly be generalized for the case of  
                               n 
                             agents as follows: If  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                     
                                        j 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           j 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            , then  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           r 
                                        
                                        
                                           j 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        ( 
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              − 
                                              j 
                                           
                                        
                                        ) 
                                     
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           
                                              { 
                                              i 
                                              , 
                                              j 
                                              } 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             (where  
                               
                                  
                                     m 
                                  
                                  
                                     − 
                                     
                                        { 
                                        i 
                                        , 
                                        j 
                                        } 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             denotes the strategy combination of all agents except agents  
                               i 
                             and  
                               j 
                            ). We will use this fact in the proof of our result.

We first prove that if  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                             for all  
                               
                                  i 
                                  ∈ 
                                  N 
                               
                            , then  
                               m 
                             is an equilibrium of  
                               
                                  
                                     G 
                                  
                                  
                                     γ 
                                  
                               
                            . Note that under these conditions,  
                               m 
                             is the Cournot equilibrium of the strategic model in which each agent values only its own benefit ( 
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        u 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     m 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  V 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     M 
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            ) and it follows from the symmetry of this game that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        j 
                                     
                                  
                               
                             for all  
                               
                                  i 
                                  , 
                                  j 
                                  ∈ 
                                  N 
                               
                            . As a consequence, since  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        γ 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  > 
                                  
                                     
                                        γ 
                                     
                                     
                                        j 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                               
                            ,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                             holds for all  
                               
                                  j 
                                  ≠ 
                                  i 
                               
                            , Therefore,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     m 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  V 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           ∑ 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                           ∈ 
                                           N 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              u 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           m 
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                            .

Consider a deviation from  
                               
                                  
                                     m 
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                  
                               
                            . For  
                               
                                  ε 
                                  > 
                                  0 
                               
                            ,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        − 
                                        ε 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                             holds. Hence  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     − 
                                     ε 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  V 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           ∑ 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                           ∈ 
                                           N 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                        
                                     
                                     − 
                                     ε 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        − 
                                        ε 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              u 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           − 
                                           ε 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 − 
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                             and, since  
                               
                                  
                                     u 
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                  
                               
                             is strictly concave in its own action and the best response is  
                               
                                  
                                     m 
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                  
                               
                            , we have that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     m 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  > 
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     − 
                                     ε 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . Now consider  
                               
                                  ε 
                                  > 
                                  0 
                               
                             such that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        + 
                                        ε 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  < 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              j 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                            . For this  
                               ε 
                            ,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     + 
                                     ε 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  = 
                                  V 
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           ∑ 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                           ∈ 
                                           N 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           k 
                                        
                                     
                                     + 
                                     ε 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              m 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        + 
                                        ε 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              u 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                        
                                           ( 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           + 
                                           ε 
                                           , 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 − 
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           ) 
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                  
                               
                             and, since  
                               
                                  
                                     u 
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                  
                               
                             is strictly concave in its own action and the best response is  
                               
                                  
                                     m 
                                  
                                  
                                     i 
                                  
                               
                            ,  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     m 
                                     ) 
                                  
                                  > 
                                  
                                     
                                        w 
                                     
                                     
                                        
                                           
                                              γ 
                                           
                                           
                                              i 
                                           
                                        
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     + 
                                     ε 
                                     , 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . Therefore,  
                               m 
                             is an equilibrium of  
                               
                                  
                                     G 
                                  
                                  
                                     γ 
                                  
                               
                            .

Reciprocally, we will prove that if  
                               m 
                             is an equilibrium of  
                               
                                  
                                     G 
                                  
                                  
                                     γ 
                                  
                               
                            , then  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        r

                                     , that is, three situations regarding the value of

                                      arise. The two first cases yield a contradiction as above. In the third case

                                      holds for some

                                           ≠ 
                                           i 
                                           , 
                                           j 
                                           , 
                                           k 
                                        
                                     . Hence,  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m

                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ

                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 r 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     . The recursive application of this reasoning leads to the expression  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           = 
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       i 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       j 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                              
                                                 
                                                    
                                                       γ 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       r 
                                                    
                                                    
                                                       k 
                                                    
                                                 
                                              
                                           
                                           … 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     . Since all the quotients are greater than one,  
                                        
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                           > 
                                           
                                              
                                                 m 
                                              
                                              
                                                 i 
                                              
                                           
                                        
                                     , which is also a contradiction.

Therefore, the result follows. □

Proof of Lemma 4.7 
                         Suppose on the contrary that  
                               
                                  
                                     
                                        m 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  = 
                                  
                                     
                                        r 
                                     
                                     
                                        i 
                                     
                                  
                                  
                                     ( 
                                     
                                        
                                           m 
                                        
                                        
                                           − 
                                           i 
                                        
                                     
                                     ) 
                                  
                               
                            . Since  
                               m 
                             is an equilibrium of  
                               
                                  
                                     G
